description: A research librarian is restructuring the library from a tag-based system to a collection-based system. Create two new collections named exactly 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet'. Move all papers currently tagged with 'dataset-mnist' into the 'dataset-mnist' collection, and all papers tagged with 'dataset-imagenet' into the 'dataset-imagenet' collection. Once the papers are moved, delete the 'dataset-mnist' and 'dataset-imagenet' tags from the library.

expected_imagenet_papers: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
